name: Skye Newman
touring_us: Unknown - UK-based, likely US dates TBA
why_notable: Won BBC Sound of 2026. Had multiple UK top 10 singles. Debut EP SE9 Part 1 peaked at #18. Raw lyricism and effortless vocal runs.

name: Geese
touring_us: Yes - Brooklyn-based band, active US touring
why_notable: Brooklyn post-punk outfit on BBC Sound of 2026 longlist. Nervy, energetic sound. Already established US club circuit presence.

name: Sombr
touring_us: Likely - US singer-songwriter with UK chart success
why_notable: US singer-songwriter with lush harmonies and yearning pop-rock. Already has a clutch of UK top 10 singles.

name: Royel Otis
touring_us: Likely - Aussie duo with growing international profile
why_notable: Australian skate-rock duo on BBC Sound of 2026 longlist. Crossover appeal between indie and surf-rock audiences.

name: Alessi Rose
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
touring_us: Possible - has opened for Dua Lipa and Tate McRae
why_notable: Opened for Dua Lipa and Tate McRae. Unflinchingly honest lyrics in a perfect pop package. Multi-list presence signals strong buzz.

name: Chloe Qisha
why_notable: Selected by panel of 170+ industry experts including Elton John and Dua Lipa for BBC Sound of 2026.

name: Florence Road
why_notable: Featured on both BBC Sound of 2026 longlist and NME 100. Double-list presence indicates strong industry consensus.

name: Jim Legxacy
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
touring_us: Possible - London rapper with growing profile
why_notable: Third mixtape Black British Music was acclaimed masterpiece. Combines freestyles with alt-rock moments. Multi-list buzz.

name: kwn
why_notable: On BBC Sound of 2026 longlist and featured on NME magazine cover. Strong industry backing.

name: Sasha Keable
why_notable: On both BBC Sound of 2026 and NME 100. Multi-list presence with R&B/soul sound that appeals to club audiences.

name: Grace Ives
why_notable: Received Pitchfork Best New Album designation in March 2026. Pop/R&B crossover with critical acclaim.

name: Twisted Teens
why_notable: Pitchfork Best New Album in February 2026. Rock act with critical momentum.

name: Otto Benson
why_notable: Debut album 'Peanut' got Pitchfork Best New Music. Watery pop-ambient soundscaping. NY-based, ideal for club/theater circuit.

name: Sarah Kinsley
why_notable: 25-year-old with viral TikTok hit. Cinematic, atmospheric dream-pop a la Caroline Polachek and Magdalena Bay. Stellar EP.

name: Sung Holly
touring_us: Likely - US-based, produced by Rostam (ex-Vampire Weekend)
why_notable: Debut single produced by Rostam. Mk.gee cover went viral. 74K TikTok, 100K Instagram. Polished bedroom pop.

name: Bory
why_notable: Signed to Ducks Ltd.'s new label. Debut album packed with hooks. Uptempo analog rock. Portland DIY scene.

name: Fcukers
publications: Indie Is Not A Genre Ones to Watch 2026
why_notable: Upcoming album noted by Pitchfork. Punk/noise rock act positioned for greater visibility in 2026.

name: After
why_notable: Featured on both NME 100 and Consequence of Sound emerging artists list. Double publication endorsement.

name: Mon Rovîa
why_notable: NME magazine cover star for March/April 2026. Also on Consequence of Sound emerging artists list. Major buzz.

name: Jalen Ngonda
touring_us: Likely - has been building US audience
why_notable: Soul/R&B artist with retro sound. Featured on Consequence of Sound's emerging artists to watch in 2026.

name: Violet Grohl
why_notable: Featured on Consequence of Sound emerging artists list. Building own identity with indie singer-songwriter sound.

name: Adult DVD
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
why_notable: Leeds band mixing post-punk with synth plugins and drum machines. Ferocious, youthful sound. Rolling Stone UK pick.

name: Sienna Spiro
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
touring_us: Possible - viral TikTok hit 'Die on This Hill'
why_notable: Huge TikTok hit. Compared to Amy Winehouse and Adele. Only 20 years old. Classic soul with powerful vocals.

name: Westside Cowboy
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
why_notable: Manchester four-piece who coined 'Britainicana'. Won Glastonbury Rising Star. Pavement-meets-folk sound.

name: Rose Gray
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
why_notable: Debut album 'Louder, Please' acclaimed. Irresistible dance-pop. NME cover feature. Party-starting presence.

name: Keo
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
why_notable: Compared to Wunderhorse. Heavy distortion and fuzz with deep lyrics. Rolling Stone UK pick for 2026.

name: TTSSFU
publications: Rolling Stone UK Ones To Watch 2026
why_notable: Lo-fi dream-pop with 90s basement recording aesthetic. New EP 'Blown' acclaimed. Rolling Stone UK pick.

name: Lola Young
why_notable: Won Best Pop Solo Performance at 68th Grammy Awards. Rolling Stone Future 25. SXSW headliner.

name: Mariae Cassandra
publications: Indie Is Not A Genre Ones to Watch 2026
why_notable: Diaristic songwriting with hazy, off-kilter production. Late-night confessional wrapped in dreamlike textures.

name: Feels Like Heaven
why_notable: Includes members of Speedway. Debut LP 'Within Dreams'. Sound between Anxious and Basement. Alt Press pick.

name: South Arcade
why_notable: Influenced by Linkin Park, Avril Lavigne, No Doubt. Huge social media following. Y2K core movement darlings.

name: Cardinals
why_notable: Debut album 'Masquerade' (Feb 2026). Clash Magazine pick as ones to watch. Ambitious era-defining collection.

name: XCOMM
why_notable: Featured prominently on NME 100 of 2026 emerging artists list.

name: Effie
why_notable: Highlighted in NME 100 2026 launch coverage as essential emerging artist.

name: Greg Mendez
why_notable: Upcoming album noted by Pitchfork new releases. Philly-based singer-songwriter on the rise.

name: Lip Critic
why_notable: Upcoming album tracked by Pitchfork. Experimental/noise act building buzz on club circuit.
